data.body: Fresh execution-phase plan review against merged 365345897 returned BLOCK with four overlapping findings covering two real missing public lifecycle proofs: unchanged successful re-review must not propagate invalidation downstream, and an in-progress self-edit must invalidate close until a fresh execution review. Gerrit 923 remains valid and merged; story stays in_progress. Adding those two focused tests in a follow-up change, then rerunning full gates, Gerrit review, plan review, and completion verification. The overlap-judge Anthropic 520 was retryable and treated as abstain; it did not determine the BLOCK.
